channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek overwhelms Emma Navarro and will face Madison Keys in the semifinals
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek is dominating her Australian Open opponents the way no one has at Melbourne Park since Maria Sharapova in 2013. Swiatek's latest lopsided win came via a 6-1, 6-2 score in the quarterfinals against No. 8 seed Emma Navarro on Wednesday. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers goes on trial over allegations of domestic violence
item.description: QUINCY, Mass. (AP) — Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday for allegedly shoving his girlfriend's head into a wall and repeatedly choking her after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CC Sabathia goes into Baseball Hall of Fame with Bay Area pride
item.description: The Vallejo-born left-hander was elected to the Baseball Hall of Fame on the first ballot with 86.8% of the vote.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes addresses flopping and referee favoritism allegations after outrage over penalties
item.description: Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes addressed fan backlash over questionable penalties called against his opponents and his attempt to draw a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool beats Lille to reach Champions League round of 16. Barcelona wins 9-goal thriller
item.description: Liverpool became the first team to guarantee a place in the last 16 of the new Champions League format by beating Lille 2-1 on Tuesday, while Barcelona fought back from two goals down to stun Benfica 5-4 in a thriller.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PGA Tour looking to move 2025 Genesis Invitational to Torrey Pines
item.description: The tournament was scheduled to take place from Feb. 13 to 16 at The Riviera Country Club, which is in the Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: With Ben Johnson on the move to Chicago, 5 head coaching vacancies remain
item.description: Ben Johnson made a quick decision. Aaron Glenn could be next. With Johnson heading to Chicago and Mike Vrabel already in New England, five head coaching vacancies remain. The Jets, Saints, Jaguars, Raiders and Cowboys are still in the hunt.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 4 indicted in break-ins at luxury homes, but link to athlete burglaries unclear
item.description: Four men from Chile were indicted Tuesday in what the Ohio attorney general called a string of burglaries at multimillion-dollar homes, but he declined to say whether professional athletes were the targets.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: SafeSport Center adds morals clause, strengthens vetting after ex-investigator's arrests
item.description: The U.S. Center for SafeSport will add a morals clause to its code of conduct, and the CEO will start interviewing job candidates herself in the wake of the arrest of a former investigator who was charged with rape and other sex crimes.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brett Favre opens up about challenge of facing Trump in golf
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Brett Favre spoke about his experience playing with Trump in a post on Monday, saying, "Trump is REALLY GOOD and a competitor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Young collector nabs rare Paul Skenes card that could offer him a hefty haul in trade with Pirates
item.description: An 11-year-old collector in Los Angeles has scooped up a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ohio State celebrates and gets ready for all the changes coming to college football in 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The early betting favorite to win next year's national championship: Ohio State. The question nobody can really answer at this time: What sort of sport will the Buckeyes or anyone else return to when they kick it off again seven months from now.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom McVie, longtime NHL coach, dead at 89
item.description: Tom McVie, Boston Bruins ambassador and former coach for the Washington Capitals, New Jersey Devils and Winnipeg Jets, is dead at age of 89.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay FC defender, 18-year pro player Jen Beattie announces retirement from soccer ahead of 2025 season
item.description: Jen Beattie's soccer career has come to an end, as the Bay FC defender and 18-year global soccer veteran announced she will be hanging up her cleats for good
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Here's why a Buffalo Bills fan ran 17 miles to get to the game
item.description: Buffalo Bills fans show their support for the team in all sorts of ways, and for one fan it's by going the distance.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka reaches the Australian Open semifinals as she seeks a third title in a row
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka's bid for a third consecutive Australian Open championship will continue after she got past Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova 2-6, 6-2, 6-3 in a surprisingly difficult quarterfinal Tuesday night. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz blow 25-point lead in overtime loss to Pelicans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) - CJ McCollum scored six of his 45 points in overtime and the New Orleans Pelicans orchestrated the largest comeback in franchise history, overcoming a 25-point deficit to beat Utah Jazz 123-119 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Late Ohio State field goal is a win for Buckeyes bettors in CFP title game victory over Notre Dame
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Jayden Fielding's 33-yard field goal with 26 seconds remaining did more than secure Ohio State's 34-23 victory over Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff title game on Monday night. It also handed Ohio State bettors the victory.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Almost a dozen Chicagoland natives are on the rosters for the teams playing in Monday's CFP Championship Game
item.description: Nearly a dozen Chicagoland natives will have a chance to win a College Football Playoff championship on Monday night in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Travis Kelce is now the only player ever to catch at least 100 passes in seven straight seasons, including the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Irish eyes smile on new path for Silver Pigskin winner Buchner
item.description: For 2019 Silver Pigskin winner Tyler Buchner, the end of the path lands in the same place as its start - back in South Bend, playing with Notre Dame and seeking a national championship. The journey includes a new position, a new sport, and a dip in the SEC.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CMU baseball, softball picked to top RMAC in 2025
item.description: In the RMAC preseason coaches poll, both CMU Baseball and CMU softball were selected to top the conference.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Wisconsin nonprofit receives money to curb human trafficking during NFL draft
item.description: 'Awaken' officials, the local nonprofit receiving this money, said this is a great win for the whole community.
item.dc:creator: Paul Steeno, NewsNation

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Big Will's Divisional Round NFL Picks
item.description: In this week's edition of NFL Picks, Big Will gives his picks for all four Divisional Round playoff games this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mission Hills 73, Rancho Bernardo 33
item.description: Mission Hills known to be one of the top teams to beat in the county, and they proved to be so with a dominant 73-33 win over Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
